name: rmpg-flex
description: RMPG Flex - CAD/RMS for Rocky Mountain Protective Group

scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.production: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:sync-version && npm run build && cd desktop && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run desktop:sync-version && npm run build && cd desktop && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run desktop:sync-version && npm run build && cd desktop && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.desktop:build:all: npm run desktop:sync-version && npm run build && cd desktop && npx electron-builder --mac --win
scripts.android:sync: cd client && npx vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: cd client && npx vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:debug: cd client && npx vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:open: cd client && npx cap open android
